title: Optimizing PvP
description: An Modpack that aims to optimize your experience and aims to try help you in PvP.
body:
A modpack that aims to improve both performance and PvP. While also cutting off those mods that are in other modpacks that decrease fps instead of increasing.

How does it help u pvp: well it doesn't make u instantly ht1 and the best player in minecraft ofc it does on the otherhand include mods to help u PvP to try improve ur skills. Mods like Marlow's crystal optimizer to help with ur crystal speed on high or low ping, armor hud so u can see if ur armor is going to break, Anti Ghost to try stop u from those annoying ghosts, where ur totem doesn't register.

This modpack is perfect for low end pc's or even high end pc's.


<details>
<summary>Installation</summary>

download the modrinth app and search it up in the search bar or go to a mrpack to .zip converter once downloaded through converter open the .zip file and export the mods either to modrinth app or ur mods folder.


</details>
